figures.caption: Figure 2: Overview of the probe’s geometric processing pipeline.

Figure 1: Design probe interface showing trend sketch (purple) and annotations (black). 1. Trend sketch; 2. Precision control; 3. Annotation tool; 4. Text input; 5. Eraser; 6. Cancel; 7. Clear; 8. Query.
Figure 5: A. A geospatial PS query. Multiple deictic references require proximity-based disambiguation for proper semantic interpretation. B. Results of query interpretation.
